changes: SUPERSEDED by task-1-fix2: this DoneClaim previously claimed fake GPU VRAM was added to the canonical local fallback fixture, but gate review found that claim stale; see task-1-fix2 evidence for the verified correction.
Renamed the fake validator helper to writePathFakeValidator and renamed the rollback test to make the current PATH fake-validator strategy and Todo 5 sibling-validator dependency explicit.
Captured required focused baseline run with EXIT_CODE:0.
Captured required full-suite RED run with EXIT_CODE:1 and intended production-gap failures.

commands.invocation: node --test --test-name-pattern "AI panel runs recommendation models in pure text mode" 2>&1 | tee .omo/evidence/task-1-fix-baseline.txt; printf '\nEXIT_CODE:%s\n' "${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> .omo/evidence/task-1-fix-baseline.txt
commands.binary_observable: Node test runner reports the focused AI panel pure-text scenario passed.

Full suite remains RED for production gaps, including VRAM filtering, no-GPU local rejection, stale cache rejection, picker label preview, local routing cleanup, missing sibling validator, and rollback failure.

manual_qa.scenario: Full Node test suite after Task 1 harness fix
manual_qa.binary_observable: Nonzero test-runner exit recorded as EXIT_CODE:1 with intended RED failures instead of the prior no-GPU/local-fallback contradiction.

cleanup.temp_files: No repo temp files added outside .omo/evidence; test harness temp directories are registered with t.after cleanup.

stale_state.result: Evidence artifacts were overwritten after the final test edit; the full-suite artifact includes the renamed PATH fake validator test and current RED output.

misleading_success_output.result: The tee pipelines have shell status 0, so each artifact records PIPESTATUS explicitly: focused baseline EXIT_CODE:0, full suite EXIT_CODE:1.

flaky_tests.result: The focused baseline was rerun after the final edit and passed; the full suite was rerun after the final edit and produced the expected nonzero RED result.

malformed_input.result: The full suite includes the malformed-input validator scenario, but current production is blocked earlier by missing bin/omo-validate-config; this is captured in the full-suite artifact as a production gap.

dirty_worktree.result: git status for scoped paths shows only test/omo-recommend-models.test.js and .omo/evidence/ as untracked/modified; the repository was already broadly untracked and no production path was edited.

remaining_classes.result: No additional adversarial class applied to this test-harness-only patch.

risks: The full suite is intentionally RED because production gaps remain; this patch only fixes the contradictory test harness assumption.
The rollback test remains coupled to the PATH fake-validator fixture until Todo 5 replaces it with sibling-validator invocation coverage.
